name: Saurabh
title: Staff Software Engineer & Solutions Architect
bioShort: Highly analytical and results-driven Staff Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience designing, building, and optimizing distributed systems, enterprise cloud applications, and responsive user experiences.
bioLong: I am a Staff Software Engineer and Solutions Architect passionate about solving complex system design challenges and delivering high-performance, robust, and accessible digital products. Over the past decade, I have led engineering teams in designing microservices architectures, optimizing cloud infrastructure costs by up to 40%, and standardizing clean frontend platforms. I thrive at the intersection of business strategy and deep technical execution, ensuring codebases remain modular, accessible, and easily maintainable. When I am not designing APIs or writing CSS animations, I contribute to open-source projects and mentor junior developers.
